content:
# Blue Account Terms

## Account Profile
Blue Account is a Northstar Bank checking account for personal customers. Use it when a customer wants a standard checking option and the conversation is about product terms, opening requirements, monthly cost, or closure timing. For side-by-side positioning against other deposit products, see "Checking Account Comparison Guide" and "Light Blue Account Terms."

## Opening Requirements
1. The minimum opening deposit for Blue Account is 25.
2. The account class must remain Blue Account when quoting these terms; do not blend these fees or rates with another checking or savings product.
3. If the customer is not seeking a personal checking account, use the applicable comparison guide before presenting this product as a fit.

## Fees And Earnings
| Term | Blue Account value |
| --- | --- |
| Monthly fee | 12 |
| Monthly fee waiver balance | 1500 |
| APY | 0.07 |

The monthly fee applies unless the Blue Account meets the fee waiver balance requirement. The APY listed here is the product APY for this account class only.

## Closing Timing
A Blue Account closed within 60 days is subject to an early closure fee of 25. For employee handling of account closures, see "Internal: Deposit Account Closure Policy."
title: Blue Account Terms
